title: Finite Graph Reachability And Traversal

solver_reuse.target: finite graph reachability Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Disconnected component no-path obstruction with bounded reachability fixed-point CNF and independent DRAT/LRAT rechecking.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote edge-cut or traversal-order rows only when they add distinct graph-search regression pressure; keep asymptotic runtime claims in the separate search-runtime/Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite reachability constraints as deterministic Bool or BV formulas.
Replay traversal witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Add matching, min-cut, and d-separation packs before extracting reusable graph helpers.
Keep asymptotic runtime and extremal graph claims out of scope until a theorem-prover route is named.
